LAW AND MOTION 302, MEDICANN, INC'S MOTION FOR NEW TRIAL DATE IS OFF CALENDAR. TO BE CALENDARED IN DEPARTMENT 206. JUDGE: CHARLOTTE WALTER WOOLARD, REPORTER: KENT GUBBINE, CSR #5797

MASTER COURT CALENDAR SET FOR NOV-08-2010 CONTINUED TO MASTER CALENDAR COURT ON NOV-15-2010 AT 9:30 AM IN 206. GOEFFREY WREN APPEARING FOR RESPONDENT. LENORE SHEFMAN APPEARING FOR APPELLANT. JEAN TALLEYRAND, CEO FOR MEDICANN, INC. WHO IS THE APPELLANT IN THIS MATTER IS ALSO PRESENT IN COURT. MR. TALLEYRAND IS CURRENTLY SEARCHING FOR NEW COUNSEL. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR THE APPELLANT TO HAVE A DETAILED REPORT ON THE PROGRESS OF GETTING A NEW LAWYER. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)

GEOFFREY THOMAS WREN APPEARING FOR RESPONDENT. JEAN TALLEYRAND, CEO FOR MEDICANN, INC. WHO IS THE APPELLANT IN THIS MATTER IS ALSO PRESENT IN COURT. MR. TALLEYRAND REPRESENTED TO THE COURT THAT HE HAS AN APPOINTMENT WITH A NEW LAWYER ON 11/23/10. THE COURT CONTINUED THE MATTER FOR APPELLANT'S COUNSEL TO BE PRESENT AND IF APPELLANT'S COUNSEL DOES NOT APPEAR, THEN THE COURT WILL RULE ON DEFENDANT'S MOTION TO DISMISS THE ACTION. JUDGE: JAMES J. MCBRIDE; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
